summary: Velion Advisor Evolution - Iteration 137. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: Core features verified. New advisor logic working: single 'advisor' field returns top-priority trigger (stuck_film shown over revenue/infrastructure), 'triggers' array contains all sorted triggers, login-greeting combines welcome + advisor, stats_summary includes can_upgrade_infra boolean, page hints work for /infrastructure, idle trigger appears at >= 3 minutes.
critical_code_review_comments: velion.py: PRIORITY_ORDER dict correctly defines priority (stuck_film=1, countdown_imminent=2, countdown=3, revenue=4, no_films=5, infrastructure_upgrade=6, pvp_event=7, social_hint=8, low_quality=9, idle=10)
velion.py: analyze_player_state returns 'advisor' as single object (top priority) and 'triggers' as sorted array
velion.py: login-greeting endpoint combines greeting + advisor.message into 'message' field
velion.py: infrastructure_upgrade check compares user_funds with upgrade cost (500k for level 0, (level+1)*1M for higher)
velion.py: countdown_imminent triggers at < 10 min remaining, countdown at < 60 min
VelionOverlay.jsx: fetchTriggers uses res.data.advisor (single object) not triggers array
VelionOverlay.jsx: Login greeting uses sessionStorage (velion_greeted_{user.id}) for once-per-session display
VelionOverlay.jsx: Page navigation triggers 2s delay re-fetch (quickTimer setTimeout 2000)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with stuck film 'Il Grande Mistero'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion Advisor Evolution fully verified. Key findings: 1) GET /api/velion/player-status returns 'advisor' (single object, top priority) and 'triggers' (sorted array). 2) Test user has stuck_film 'Il Grande Mistero' which correctly shows as advisor (priority 1). 3) stats_summary.can_upgrade_infra is boolean. 4) GET /api/velion/login-greeting returns combined message (greeting + advisor). 5) idle trigger appears when idle_minutes >= 3. 6) Frontend bubble shows ONLY the top advisor suggestion. 7) VelionPanel opens via window.dispatchEvent(new Event('velion-tutorial-open')). 8) Daily bonus popup appears after login - close with X button. 9) Tutorial tab has 'Avanti', 'Indietro', 'Salta' buttons. 10) Chat tab has quick ask chips with data-testid='velion-quick-0' through 'velion-quick-4'.

triggers_array.description: Array of all detected triggers sorted by priority

priority_order.order: stuck_film(1) > countdown_imminent(2) > countdown(3) > revenue(4) > no_films(5) > infrastructure_upgrade(6) > pvp_event(7) > social_hint(8) > low_quality(9) > idle(10)

frontend_bubble_single_suggestion.observed: Bubble shows only stuck_film message, not multiple triggers
